name: Karanal

notes: Kashmir musk accord, dry and warm.

name: Alpha Ionone
notes: Woody violet, less powdery than beta.

name: Bourgeonal

name: Cedramber

notes: Fern-floral, sweet and clean. Classic fougere.

name: Ebanol

name: Ethyl Maltol
notes: Cotton candy, sweet. Stronger than maltol.

notes: Lily of valley, linden blossom. Allergen.

name: Majantol

name: Methyl Ionone
notes: Orris-violet, powdery woody. More tenacious than ionones.

name: Okoumal

name: Timberol
notes: Soft creamy sandalwood. Similar to Javanol.

name: Tonalide

name: Iso Butyl Quinoline
notes: Birch tar-leather. Classic leather accord material.

name: Vertofix Coeur
notes: Cedarwood-musk, smooth and round. Excellent fixer.

name: Ambrox DL
notes: Racemic ambroxan. Slightly softer than pure ambroxan.

name: Amyl Salicylate
notes: Orchid, sweet floral. Good in floral accords.

name: Citronellyl Nitrile

name: Laevo Muscone
notes: Natural muscone. Most refined macro-cyclic musk.

name: Benzyl Salicylate
notes: Sweet balsamic, fixative. Declared EU allergen.

name: Limonene

name: Isoeugenol

name: Eugenyl Acetate
notes: Clove with softer edge than eugenol.
